forbiddenProps.name: color
forbiddenProps.reason: HugoUIButtonCommonProps omits MUI ButtonProps color. Use colorTheme instead.

forbiddenProps.name: variant
forbiddenProps.reason: HugoUIButtonCommonProps omits MUI ButtonProps variant. Use level instead.

discouragedProps.name: sx
discouragedProps.reason: Public MUI escape hatch. AI-generated usage should prefer level, colorTheme, and size before raw style overrides.

discouragedProps.name: style
discouragedProps.reason: Public React escape hatch. Use only for layout integration that cannot be expressed by component props.

discouragedProps.name: className
discouragedProps.reason: Public styling escape hatch. Do not use to recreate internal HugoUIButton classes.

discouragedProps.name: component
discouragedProps.reason: Inherited MUI root element escape hatch. AI-generated usage should keep the default Button root unless integration explicitly requires an override.

loading.notes: loading disables click behavior; center loading preserves button width.

iconOnly.notes: Use only when children provides an accessible label and an icon is visible.

generationPolicy: Do not hardcode raw color values for normal button usage.
Choose colorTheme and level instead of overriding MUI color or variant.
Use colorTheme="red" only for destructive primary actions.

a11yRules.rule: When loading is true, the component sets aria-busy and prevents click handling.
When labelHidden is true, children must be a meaningful accessible label.
Use type="button" unless the button submits or resets a form.

generationRules.rule: Default generated Button usage should use level="primary", colorTheme="purple", size="medium", and type="button" unless the design indicates otherwise.
Use colorTheme="red" with the primary level for destructive actions.
Use startIcon or endIcon only when the icon adds meaning or improves recognition; keep visible text unless labelHidden is required.

validationRules.rule: Generated code must import Button from @hugo-ui/mui.
Generated code must not use MUI color or variant props on Button.

component.description: Inherited MUI root element override. Do not use by default in AI-generated Button usage.

needsReviewReason: First contract version includes component-authored props plus selected inherited props that are used by source, stories, or tests. Review before treating all inherited MUI escape hatches as covered.
